title: Human Cognition & AI Oversight
builds_on: M2 - how AI systems work and where they fail
scope: Cognitive biases, automation bias, the Judgment Framework, oversight case-study deepdive.

assessments.title: Cognition Lab Report & Final Portfolio
assessments.outcome: The learner can apply the Judgment Framework, design human-in-the-loop oversight, and present a complete, well-documented body of work ready for capstone building.
